headline: 4 Miscellaneous Food Stocks Worth Watching Amid Industry Challenges

headline: Luna Bar strategizes new era with social ads starring Jessica Alba
summary: The Mondelēz-owned snack bar brand’s “Easy to Love” campaign represents its first major creative push in nearly a decade.
